version_description: This version is true to the syncopated style in the song, and includes more guitar-centric chords.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
this is based on this live performance February 2020: https://youtu.be/umPPvzwtva0


Chords I used:
  [ch]Am[/ch]  577xxx
  [ch]Dm[/ch]  x577xx
  [ch]Gm[/ch]  355xxx
  [ch]C[/ch]   x355xx
  [ch]Bb[/ch]  x133xx

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Feelin' good, like I should[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
Went an' took a walk around the neighborhood[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Feelin' blessed, never stressed[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch] 
Got that sunshine on my Sunday best[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, everyday can be a better day despite the challenge[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
All you gotta do is leave it better than you found it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
It's gonna get difficult to stand but hold your balance[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch] 
I just say whatever 'cause there is no way around it[/tab]

[Pre Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
'Cause everyone falls down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
But you just gotta know it'll all be fine,   it's okay,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
              uh-uh uh,     uh               it's okay,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch] 
                    it's okayyyyyyy[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.        [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Ay feeling good,               like I should[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Went and took a walk around the neighborhood[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Feelin' blessed,              never stressed[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Got that sunshine    on   my   Sunday   best[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, somedays you wake up and nothing works you feel surrounded[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Gotta give your feet some gravity to get you grounded[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]Gm[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Keep good things inside your ears just like the waves and sound did[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch] 
And just say whatever 'cause there is no way around it[/tab]


[Pre Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
'Cause everyone falls down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
But you just gotta know it'll all be fine,   it's okay,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
              Ah ah-ah,     ah               it's okay,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch] 
                    it's okayyyyyyy[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.        [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Ay feeling good,               like I should[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Went and took a walk around the neighborhood[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Feelin' blessed,              never stressed[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Got that sunshine    on   my   Sunday   best[/tab]

[Instrumental]
 [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
 [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
 [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Outro] (slowly)
 [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]
